message:
test(sql): add tests for scalar and aggregate functions

Add 19 tests for SQL function modules:

scalar_functions.zig (11 tests):
- Date parsing and conversion (parseDatePart, daysToDate)
- String functions (UPPER, LOWER, LENGTH, TRIM)
- Math functions (ABS, ROUND, FLOOR, CEIL)
- Arithmetic operations and null handling

aggregate_functions.zig (8 tests):
- Accumulator tests (SUM, AVG, MIN/MAX, COUNT)
- Statistical functions (STDDEV, VARIANCE)
- PercentileAccumulator for MEDIAN
- Function detection and type parsing

All 260 Zig tests pass.
